environment_audit.behavior_oracle_restriction: Behavior policies are fixed action-probability policies and do not use exact Q, exact DP, or learned value preferences for data generation.

medium_right_bias.description: non-oracle state-independent medium exploratory right bias

mild_right_bias.description: non-oracle state-independent mild exploratory right bias

strong_right_bias.description: non-oracle state-independent strong exploratory right bias

sampled_augmented_target_semantics.continued_target: max_a M(s_next,a), no extra gamma factor

environment_audit.terminal_absorbing_handling: No original RiverSwim states are terminal. Original-transition bootstraps are always active. Sampled g_plus/g_minus absorbing events do not bootstrap.

coverage_performance_regression.note: Negative target values favor deterministic soft learning.

medium_right_bias.description: non-oracle state-independent medium exploratory right bias

mild_right_bias.description: non-oracle state-independent mild exploratory right bias

strong_right_bias.description: non-oracle state-independent strong exploratory right bias
